name: Tapestry
description: The master orchestration skill for the tapestry collection. Detects content type (YouTube, article, PDF), extracts clean content, and automatically creates a Ship-Learn-Next action plan in one command.

findings_summary.notes: Parent repo michalparkola/tapestry-skills-for-claude-code confirmed (253 stars, MIT, Shell, created Oct 2025). Subdirectory tapestry/ exists with SKILL.md confirmed. Repo contains install.sh and 4 skill subdirectories (tapestry, article-extractor, youtube-transcript, ship-learn-next). Requires yt-dlp and Mozilla Readability/trafilatura for full functionality - external tool dependencies. 42 forks. MIT license. No malicious code. Tool execution (yt-dlp, Python scripts) required for operation.
